summary: Iteration 4 — Verified new Audit Log feature end-to-end. Backend: added 11 new pytest cases to /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (TestAuditLog class) covering auth guards, summary shape & counts, reading-edits shape, sort order, instrument_type filters (flowmeter/dwlr), hardware_id filter, limit, and DWLR source label (must be 'dwlr' not 'instrument'). Total: 81/81 backend tests pass (70 carried-forward + 11 new). Frontend: validated client cannot see 'Audit Log' sidebar entry and direct /audit-log shows 'Admin access required'; admin sees the link, lands on /audit-log with 3 summary cards (Total edits=7, By source [Flowmeter:5, Other:2], Top editors [Envirolytics Admin: 7]), Filters card and Edit history table. Filter source=flowmeter narrows table to 5 rows (all flowmeter); source=dwlr narrows to 2 rows (all dwlr); each row shows editor full_name + email, source badge, hardware ID, reading timestamp, and human-readable values_snapshot (e.g., 'LEVEL=12 · TEMPER=22').
critical_code_review_comments: api_audit.py: editor lookup issues one find_one per distinct user_id — fine for current scale; consider $lookup or batching if reading_edits ever exceeds a few thousand.

api_audit.py: when instrument_type filter is unknown (e.g., 'foo'), it silently returns flowmeter-only results because the elif branch only triggers when instrument_type is falsy. Consider returning 400 for unknown instrument_type to fail fast.
AuditLog.jsx fetches both endpoints sequentially on mount/apply — could be parallelised with Promise.all for snappier UX (~50ms saving).
Top editors card only renders the first editor name in screenshot; verify that more than one editor still displays well (multi-line) when populated.
seed_data_creation: TestAuditLog fixture creates TEST_AUDIT_FM_<rand> (3 monotonic flowmeter readings + 1 edit on middle reading) and TEST_AUDIT_DWLR_<rand> (1 DWLR ingest + 1 edit). Persisted; identifiable via TEST_AUDIT_ prefix for future cleanup.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Login route is '/' (NOT '/login'). All Audit Log testids confirmed: sidebar-audit-log, audit-log-page, audit-total-count, audit-filter-source (values: '', 'flowmeter', 'dwlr', 'ph', 'tds', 'conductivity'), audit-filter-hardware, audit-filter-limit, audit-apply-btn, audit-table, audit-row-<id>. Backend endpoints under /api/admin/audit-log/{summary,reading-edits}, admin-only. DWLR-edited rows correctly carry source='dwlr' (not 'instrument'). On dashboard the route after login is /dashboard directly (no /policies redirect for these accounts).
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — no functional bugs reproduced. One brief detour: initial Playwright run hit '/login' which is not a route ('No routes matched location /login'); the login form is mounted at '/'. Updated test script accordingly.
